meaning: n.伸展,展开,传播,蔓延,酒席,宴会,桌布v.伸展,展开,铺,涂,敷,摆,传播,散布
examples: A grin spread across her face.
The news spread by word of mouth.
Foreign doctors and nurses are trying, for instance, to stem the spread of infectious diseases.
Demand for something different grew so big, microbrewing spread to even the tiniest villages.
